resources.string: You are using 3G/4G network, please note your network flow consumption or use WiFi
"Forwarding Channels Limited Please double click to check"

"After being turned on, it only connects to the internet when the cat's eye is awakened (such as someone passing by or lighting up the door), and cannot actively check the door, which is very energy-saving"
After being turned off, keep connected and you can always view the door outside through the app
Automatically activate power-saving mode based on the time period you set
The requested action could not be completed.
Note: Please start after hearing the voice prompt.
"2. Then separate the devices. When the flashing light is on, it means binding has been successful."
1.Select System Settings - Scan QR Code in the main device
3.After hearing beep, go to the next step
2.Place the QR code facing the outer camera.
1.Press set key on the back of camera
3.When you see Scan successful. Connecting, please wait, then press the button for next
2.Place the QR code toward the camera lens
The duration of opening and closing exceeds the set time range
Please set a delayed shutdown time
The start time and end time cannot be less than 30 minutes
"VEIU 2 · VEIU 2C · VEIU 3(S) VEIU 5 · VEIU 6 · 叮咚mini3S· S31"
"T1 · T2 · T3 · CE200 · JD1 · T21 · CE100 VEIU mini2· VEIU mini2S· VEIU mini3S· E6800"
Unable to add. Please check the network and try again.
3/3. Adding the device. It may take sometime, please be patient.
Voice message reminders, memos, blessings, etc., played when the door is opened, so that you and your family no longer forget important things
Power LED red, please check the network
Power LED green, please replugin the power cable, network cable
"The last one step to finish binding the Hub and the Doorbell"
Long press the reset key 2 seconds to restart it , then poke the wps reset key.
Poke the key on the doorbell backside
Go to the next step against the doorbell prompts
Connect the power supply, When the power LED turn green(around 60s), the device initializes successfully.
Connect the smartphone with WiFi network
Same as the WiFi network which the Hub connected
Please connect smartphone with WiFi network
"Connecting. This may take 1-2 minutes. Please be patient."
If you want to change your phone number, please go to Service Settings - Associate Phone to modify it
The current WiFi is not available. Please change your network and try to add a device again.
The network account or password must exclude semicolon ;
After placeholder seconds, you can search again.
E103: You requested an Ad larger than the measured ad space. Ad space size: %dx%d, request size: %dx%d

1. Regularly update gas values and status after activation. 2. Reporting mechanism: The lock is awakened, and the lock end can be set to report at regular intervals, with a minimum interval of 1 hour and a maximum interval of 12 hours. 3. Gas values and status are for reference only. If more accurate data is needed, please use dedicated detection equipment for detection
In the detection of harmful gases, please be patient and wait
This is the doorbell ringtone when an alarm is triggered
This is time period between someone detected and alarm rings
This is doorbell volume when an alarm is triggered
Look for the QR code from the phone album
You have not yet connected to this account, unable to obtain device control permissions
After cancellation, you will not be able to control the device through Amazon Alexa
"'Equations' on the' Amazon Alexa 'platform has been granted device control permission"
The username cannot be numbers only.
Cannot load a new ad while the current ad is expanded. onAdRequestFailed will not be called

"For ideal drying results, please replace the desiccant every 30 days. Excessive use may cause: 1. Wet pet food will lose its freshness and become worse. 2. Moisturize easily breeds bacteria and mold, which directly endangers the health of pets."
Start using a new desiccant, are you sure to reset?
Choose the number of feeding portions
Set the number of repeated voice playback times, default playback once
Capture or record feeding during feeding
The network is down, please click retry！
The pet has come to eat
Connect the power and confirm that the indicator light is flashing rapidly or you hear a prompt sound
Set feeding plan to support up to 10 items！
Automatically record dynamic videos when the device detects pet feeding
Video recording is stored in the cloud, and devices that have been stolen, damaged, or offline can still view historical videos
Unlimited cloud storage space, how much is recorded and stored within the validity period of the package
This is a value-added service. After activation, feed and record a 5-15s video
Immediately capture a real-time photo after feeding is completed

1. After purchase, the service will take effect immediately. When a pet is detected eating, a video will be automatically uploaded to the cloud for storage; N2. The feeding video service purchased this time can only be used on this device.
The same feeding plan already exists and cannot be added！
Please manually feed or confirm the network status on the device and try again
Confirm that the indicator light is flashing rapidly or a prompt sound is heard
The device has a new version, click to upgrade?
Device upgrade failed, please do not delete the device. Plug in and unplug the power supply to upgrade the device again!
After opening, you can turn off the voice playback of grain dispensing
Mute can be turned on during the designated no disturb time period
Do not disturb the time period
Click to update custom feeding reminder voice
Automatically call pets for food delivery
"If not recorded, the default voice will be It's time to eat, come eat!"
Automatically play voice calls for pets to come and eat after each meal
Click the microphone button to record up to 15 seconds of voice, and play the latest recorded voice every time the food is dispensed
Used for scanning QR codes and other functions
Used to search for nearby Bluetooth devices, perform network distribution and connection functions, etc
Get WiFi list for device distribution network
Send message push notifications on the APP
The mobile push operation guide was not found！
Used for functions such as doorbell call notification and reminder
Used for saving device side images, videos, and other functions
Used for keeping the app active in the background and improving message delivery rate
Used for device voice intercom and other functions
Click to learn more or stop the application
Your every evaluation is crucial to us
Able to receive doorbell call and alarm notification rapidly
Turn on optimizer,choose App launch, find Eques,turn it
"Find 'Eques' and turn button off and turn manual mamagement button on"
To ensure your data security, please fill in the original password before changing it
Are you sure you want to use Wifi without any password?
The device requires recording permission. Please allow recording under your phone settings.
This is time period between detection and snapshot
Banner setAdapter() 参数不能为空
你还没有调用 setAdapter() 方法
After hearing the camera voice prompt...
To start binding, please activate the device.
The lock has been forced to open.
Please confirm the network to which the device is connected
This device only supports 2.4GHz WiFi connection
What are the WiFi requirements of the binding device?
"Connecting. This may take 1-3 minutes. Please be patient."
The device has been bound by (\"%\"). If you wish to continue, it will unbind with the previous account.
Binding failed. The device has been bound by (\"%\")
1.Ensure that the phone is within 5 meters of the device；
2.Turn off the Bluetooth function on your phone and then turn it back on again；
3.Please confirm that the device is turned on and in a network configuration state；
4.Please confirm if your device supports Bluetooth networking。
"Device connection network timeout Please try to investigate the following reasons first"
1.Keep presing reset button, the doorbell will prompt Default settings restored successfully, start scanning
2.Use the camera to scan QR code.
When the lock is bound, you can unlock and receive unlock alerts remotely.
Add lock using the indoor monitor
(Some lock binding mode are different, please refer to the user manual)
"Connecting. This may take 1-30 sec. Please be patient."
In accordance with national regulations, real-name authentication is required. Please bind your phone number to continue using the service.
Network error, please check the network.
1. Refer to the manual of the smart lock and let the lock enter the distribution network mode. The operation modes of different locks may be slightly different
2.Check the locked indoor display screen, and one of the following two display modes will appear. Please select the corresponding icon and click to enter the corresponding distribution mode
"None of the above are or No indoor display screen"
Please operate on the device to enter distribution network mode
Binding devices need to be done under WiFi networks
The current lock version does not support binding, please upgrade first！
The current device does not have a suitable adapter to match！
There are currently no devices available for association~
After association, mobile split screen can dial the smart lock with one click
The device is in sleep mode
For a better user experience, please upgrade the version immediately and rebind after upgrading. Without upgrading, you will not be able to use it！
Discovered a new version of split screen

string.name: bind_t1_scan_qr_code_page_hint_one
string.Data: 1.Press and hold home key for 5 seconds

resources.string: 2.Place the QR code facing the outer camera
The device has been set with wechat reminder
Enter the wechat app, select my - Settings - device, select and delete the device
Binding timeout, please check if the WiFi password is correct!
WiFi signal is not good, please enter the correct WiFi name
Please enter the correct WiFi password
Error connecting to WiFi or device unable to connect to WiFi, please restart the router and try again
Other abnormalities when connecting to WiFi, please restart the router and try again
WiFi cannot connect to the external network, please ensure that WiFi can connect to the external network
What are the WiFi requirements for binding devices?
Please enter the name of the bound WIFI

string.name: bind_wifi_need
string.Data: This device only supports the use of<font color=#4D7CFE>2.4GHZ</font> WiFi

resources.string: Please try the following troubleshooting steps.
Please follow the prompts to perform remote unlock verification
Only one verification method is supported at the same time!
After opening, fingerprint can be used for remote unlocking verification
E302: The server returned an ad with the response, but it was blank. There is probably an issue with the creative.
Once turned on, Automatic photos or videos will be saved when a visitor is detected.
Someone is outside your door. Camera is on.
Current temperature is above 25℃, please set the PIR sensitivity as high level.
长时间未操作，请重新登录
The one week experience card does not support returns, exchanges, or gifting
This device does not support purchasing services
The service you purchased is a virtual commodity and does not support unsubscribing or gifting. Please confirm before making the payment

string.name: call_duration_hint
string.Data: ended after %s

string.name: call_duration_hint_two
string.Data: seconds!

resources.string: Please turn on call permissions to use this feature
Enable camera permission to use this function
Please allow camera permissions for QR code scanning
The device requires camera permission, please allow camera permission on your phone system settings
Turn on in backlight environment to improve image effect
The current camera does not support intercom
Are you sure you want to cancel the collection of the selected messages?
Are you sure you want to stop sharing?
You can set burst mode to capture 1, 3 or 5 images
You can set burst mode to capture 1 or 3 images

During the set time period, when the device triggers an alarm, it will receive message push and phone reminder. When the device rings the doorbell, it will receive voice call and message push. Outside of this time period, alarms and doorbell ringing will only be message pushed.
During the set time period, when the device triggers an alarm, it will receive message push notifications and phone reminders. Outside of this time period, alerts will only be pushed as messages.

During the set time period, someone rings the doorbell on the device, and the phone receives voice calls and message push notifications. Outside of this time period, only message push notifications can be received.
Real time monitoring of external environment for significant changes, saving videos and quickly uploading alarms when there are significant changes
Do you want to switch to home mode
Do you want to switch to home mode?
Switch phone number to log in
Do you want to save the nickname
"Note: 1. Open Wi-Fi 2. Change network Eques_Hotspot_R20_Test 3. Long press to copy password 4. Connect to the wifi network then go back to the binding interface."
Please check whether the device network connection is normal
Limited to English letters and numbers
The duration of opening/closing can be set within a timed range, and the device can perform multiple cycles of opening/closing
The device can be randomly turned on/off once within the set time period
The device automatically shuts off at the end of the set time every time it is turned on
Are you sure you want to delete all PIR alarm pictures and videos?
Smart lock, which was opened by %, has been closed.
Once you cancel the collection, you will not be able to collect it again

string.name: cloud_service_integral_deduction_protocol
string.Data: cloud_service_integral_deduction_protocol<font color=#4AACE0>《cloud storage service agreement 》</font>

resources.string: You can view the not viewed alarms in the recent %s
Favorite alarms, saved in the cloud %s
All primary devices under your account are available, unlimited
Rebinding the equipment and retrieving the collected alarm at any time
each alarm is saved in the cloud from the collection time. %s" (for example, today's cloud storage expires, and yesterday's collected alarms are still saved "%s)
For renewal and upgrade, please contact customer service: 4000180217

string.Data: Available<font color=#FB8D31>%points</font>， to deduct <font color=#FB8D31>%syuan</font>

string.Data: You have <font color=#FB8D31>%spoints</font>，available after%s

resources.string: 1. 1 yuan can be deducted for every full%s points
3. view the points and pass my - points grade
2. different deductible amounts for different packages

"Failed to obtain backend sensor permissions, Please select Always Allow"

Failed to obtain permissions, please grant permissions manually
"Failed to obtain media location permission Please clear the application data and try again"
View permission for floating bullet boxes
During power saving operation, if you need to change the mode, go to the settings to modify
"Only when the cat's eye wakes up (for example, someone passes by the door or lights up the screen), the network can not actively view the door outside, which is very power-saving"
Always connected to the Internet, you can view the door through the app at any time
Drift by, point a like and leave~
Scan the QR code and join the community
Why does the equipment consume electricity?
"The user was lazy and didn't say anything^_^"
Are you sure you want to delete the device?
Confirm authorization to associate with Google account?
You can now control your device through Amazon Alexa
The network server is not available, please check the network.
Unable to connect to the server, please check your network and try again
Received console message: %s at line %d with sourceId %s
Enter a valid cellphone number or email address.
Firing pixel did not succeed, retrying in %dms
The next execution will be on %s
Please replace the battery for the lock
Backup battery is enabled, please check the power supply
Reminder time of APP when the door is not closed
The device version is too old.
The device version is too old. Failed to get more information.
Deleting the device will erase all PIR alarm information
Deleting the device will erase all PIR alarm and smart lock information.
User has active messages. Cannot delete
Deleted messages will no longer play. Confirm deletion?
"Note: A new version is available, update now?"
When someone continues to capture %s seconds later, start capturing
When the battery level is low, the Sentinel Cat Eye will automatically close
When the battery level is low, the 24-hour monitoring alarm will be automatically turned off
Do you need to replace the current wallpaper with album photos?
Group information,photos and alerts will be deleted
Confirm to delete the selected message?
After saving, this photo will not belong to this group.
The current number of face captures is insufficient, please wait patiently
Device intercom is in progress and cannot be viewed. Please try dialing again later!
"You haven't added any device. Please click + on the upper right to add a device."
Less than 500M of memory left. Please manage the storage capacity.
Are you sure to restore factory settings?
Happy New Year! Congratulations on getting rich
I miss you guys so much
The device is offline, unable to receive further information.
This model does not support PIR detection
The current device does not support scanning upgrade
Please switch to hotspot for upgrade
Give the reasons and details in less than 200 words.

string.name: door_msg_17
string.Data: <font color=#4D7CFE>【%s】</font><font color=#151515>Voiceprint opens the door</font>

resources.string: This is the doorbell ringtone when someone presses the doorbell
Once turned on, the doorbell button will light when someone presses the button
The doorbell button will light when someone is detected
High resolution and clear video will occupy large space and consume more power
Screen switched on automatically when someone inside close to device or motion detection is triggered
Screen switched on automatically when someone inside close to device or doorbell is pressed
"When there are people outside the door and it is sensed that there are people inside the door, the cat's eye will automatically light up"
This is doorbell volume when someone presses doorbell
Eques download finished, click to install.
Change to hot spot bingding mode
1. Please connect your mobile wifi to the following network:

1.If the network is not found in the system settings, please turn off and turn on the WiFi switch again to search

resources.string: "2.If the phone prompts this hotspot can't access the Internet, do you want to switch? during the connection process, please select do not switch or continue to use"
"3.If you stay on this page for a long time and cannot display Next, please turn off your phone's mobile network and try again, or long press Go and set WIFI"
1. Whether the WiFi password is entered correctly;
2. Whether the WiFi is in the 2.4GHz frequency band;
3. Whether the WiFi name is Chinese or special characters;
4. the operation interval of adding door lock is too long;
Mobile phone is sending WiFi information
Device is binding to user account
Mobile phone is reconnecting to family network
Please connect to the same WiFi which mobile phone is connecting
Upgrading, it will take 3-5 minutes, do not power off
WiFi only off in standby mode
— Dead bolt is available inside the house —
You can try this binding way with success rate over 98%.
The device only supports 2.4G network. Please switch the network.
"2.After hearing 'Entered binding mode already',Connect mobile phone to the network: \t\tWiFi SSID: E1pro-eques, \t\tWiFi password: 12345678"
"2.After hearing 'Entered binding mode already',Connect mobile phone to the network: \t\tWiFi SSID: CloudHome-Eques-16, \t\tWiFi password: 12345678"
"1.Active lock, input 2288#, then input admin password after hearing 'Please authorize'"
Please try the following troubleshooting steps:
"1. Active lock, input 0808#, then input admin password after hearing 'Please authorize'"
"2. Click 'Next' after hearing 'Entered binding mode already'"
Deleting the device will erase all alarms and messages.
This member will not be able to use the device after deletion
Delete members, no longer share to him
If you forget to close the door, please check in time, safety first

resources.string: Fingerprint attempt to unlock is frozen
Card attempt to unlock is blocked
Remote control attempt to unlock is frozen
Password attempt to unlock is blocked
Face attempt to unlock is frozen
There are strangers at the door
There is someone wandering at the door
Forgot to pull out the key
Finger vein attempting to unlock frozen
Finger vein attempting to unlock alarm
Palmar vein attempting to unlock frozen
Palmar vein attempting to unlock alarm
Alarm if the door is not closed properly
Warning: your lock may be violently pried
Low battery, please replace the battery in time
Someone open the door with remote control
Someone opened the door with key

string.name: e1pro_lock_msg_hint_one
string.Data: <font color=#4D7CFE>【%s】</font><font color=#151515>Open the door</font>

resources.string: Open the door with the button inside the door
Open the door with temporary password

string.name: e1pro_lock_msg_hint_three
string.Data: <font color=#4D7CFE>【%s】</font><font color=#151515>Open the door with App</font>

resources.string: The sharer can remotely unlock, obtain the door & lock status, unlock notification, and set up the remingding when door is unlocked
"The sharer can't share device, modify lock nickname & network mode, upgrade the lock system"
Able to unlock remotely anytime. Receive notification rapidly via App. Consume more energy
Unable to read lock status and unlock remotely. Energy-saving
Only able to unlock remotely and receive notification via App when the lock is active. Recommended
"* APP can unlock remotely only when the door lock is awakened; * APP can receive the message in time when someone opens the door;"
How long will APP remind ever since the door is unlocked
Lock always connected to the network

string.name: e1pro_zw_lock_msg_hint
string.Data: <font color=#754C24>【%s】</font><font color=#151515>Palmprint recognition open door</font>

resources.string: "Door is open for a while, it enters standby mode automatically. Energy-saving mode will be active after door close"
Under power-saving mode, please operate when the device waken up
No one appears at present. You can view the live video when there is someone
When identifying this group of people
Record alarms but do not push reminders
show() was called, and wants an interstitial ad, but there are no valid interstitials in the queue. Load more?
If not set, the default unit is the portion size, with a weight of approximately 10g per serving
There are no plans for today~
Feeding is based on the number of portions, with a default of around 10g per portion
Please input the appropriate amount of grams based on the particle size and density of the main grain
When the battery level is low or the network connection is abnormal, the monitoring mode will be exited
This email ID has already been registered.
Do you really want to give up on purchasing?

"Master, cat's eye reminds you that you have guests"

tmall elf will voice remind:

Successfully submitted. Thank you for your suggestions.

string.Data: Press the indoor button <font color=#4D7CFE>3</font> times

resources.string: Both indoor and outdoor device making a sound indicates a successful binding

string.Data: Press the outdoor doorbell button <font color=#4D7CFE>again</font>

resources.string: Express please put it in the express cabinet
The express is at the door
Just a moment, please. Open the door right away

string.Data: Set up successfully, it will take effect after doorbell rung or people detected!

resources.string: 2. ring the doorbell to wake up the device;
Device does not need to be upgraded

string.name: h6_low_battery_hint_one
string.Data: When charging, do not<font color=#4D7CFE>open or close the door</font>

resources.string: There may be a timing error of about 30 seconds
Better for us to know your problem.
Some features in %1$s may not work properly without HMS Core, which is not installed on your device.
%1$s is unable to use HMS Core. Launch Optimizer (Phone Manager) or go to Settings, enable all permissions for %2$s (including auto-launch and secondary launch), and try again.
This app may not work optimally if you cancel the installation of HMS Core. Cancel anyway?
Failed to download HMS Core package.
Not enough free space. Download cannot be completed.

"Some features in %1$s rely on HMS Core to work properly. Download and install HMS Core (Size: %2$s)?
You can change HMS Core settings once it is installed."
HMS Core must be installed to use this feature. Install?
It appears that you have an unofficial version of HMS Core (%1$s) installed on your device. Please uninstall HMS Core from Settings and return to this app to install the official version.
Update to the latest version of HMS Core to use this feature. Update now?

"This service requires the latest version of the following app:
%1$s"
No Wi-Fi connection. Download using mobile data?
"Can't find device WiFi or stay on this page for a long time?"
Please turn off your mobile network first
Would you like to allow this app to access your location?
%s would like to access your location
"E203: Ad couldn't be fetched due to io error, probably http related."
E201: Connection to ad server timed out.
"E200: Couldn't reach the ad server even though network connectivity was detected. Is the server down?"
E208: Ad Request url was malformed..
Your cloud storage is about to expire and cannot enjoy privileges
Open cloud storage and enjoy privileges
Buy and get free, enjoy double privileges
The equipment is disconnected and recovered at any time
This function can be used when purchasing cloud storage
Buy cloud storage and get free as long as you buy it
After the expiration of face service, if you need to continue to use it, you can continue to open cloud storage
Automatically activate face recognition after purchasing cloud storage
Users who have already subscribed to the face service can then subscribe to cloud storage, and the face recognition service time is superimposed
Users who have activated cloud storage will automatically activate face recognition services
Your cloud storage has expired and cannot enjoy privileges
Cloud storage has expired. Renew and enjoy privileges now
Your device can only store alarm records within%s days
Cloud storage is not enabled, and the duration of free cloud storage is only%s days
You will enjoy the following privileges
There are%s points in total, and%s points can be used to deduct%s yuan

string.Data: Paid in amount:<font color=#FB8D31>¥%s</font>

resources.string: Cloud storage service is about to expire!
Currently launching native intent. Ignoring url: %s
The storage time is:%s days, please download it locally in time
Want someone to ring the doorbell and call immediately?

Enter the device share invitation code.
Click to confirm and modify the language. The system will restart
No users added. Configure user settings
Voice messages are only available for users. Configure user settings

Your voice message [%s] has been played
Recipients will hear your message upon door access. Messages expire after 30 days
A fast ImageView (and Drawable) that supports rounded corners (and ovals or circles) based on the original example from Romain Guy.
It is taking a long time to load. Please check your network.
Enable location permission to use this function
During the addition process, please follow the lock end prompts to operate
Connect the smart lock to a separate router
The current lock version is low and cannot be associated with the lock. Please go to the lock settings interface to upgrade the version！
Daily unlocking, adding management users, entering local settings, restoring factory settings
Please select the type of key you want to add
The current lock control version is not supported！
Please complete the addition on the lock end
Failed to obtain lock support function, some shortcuts may have failed！
The user has completed the %s input and needs to input a total of %s times
Cat Eye main control version information
WIFI module main control version information
Version information of face/palm vein module
Version information of motion sensing module
Log request will be delayed by %dms to account for idletime
Bind the mobile number to quickly log in with the mobile number, which can also improve the security of the account
The account has been locked out due to multiple failed attempts to login.
Fail to log on as server in maintenance!
Please enter your mobile number / user name
User authentication has expired, please log in again！
Please enter the graphic verification code
Quick login with mobile number, more secure account
Long press to copy to clipboard
The longest duration of alarm recording is% s
The current lock battery is low, and it may exit the monitoring mode after being turned on
The device will be offline while updating, it will be online after updating successfully.
The Hub is offline,Please check the Hub network
Making an AdFetcher to begin fetching ads
After factory reset, it will clear all records and return to initialization status.
Equipment needs to be bound again!
After factory reset, it will clear all records and return to initialization status.
The Hub sound when someone ring the doorbell
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
overrideMaxSize enabled, but max size not set.
To save battery power, it is not recommended to upgrade under battery power! Please switch adapter power supply upgrade！
The server responded with ads, but none were valid
A mediated request was made with null activity parameter
Instantiating mediated ad failed due to %s
After unlocking, automatically activate the home mode
After linking with the Mi Home App, it can be linked with Mi Home devices
快速绑定手机号，提升账号安全性

In order to provide you with Mobservice, please check our service policy. For details, please click http://www.mob.com/policy/en. If you agree with our service policy, please click accept, if you do not agree with our service policy, please click reject
为了给您提供Mobservice相关产品服务，请您详细查看我们的隐私政策，详见http://www.mob.com/about/policy。如您同意我们的隐私政策，请点击“接受”，如您不同意我们的隐私政策，请点击“拒绝”。
The nickname cannot be modified for the primary account
AdFetcher requested to start, but tasker already instantiated
User already has 3 entry messages. Delete existing ones
Tap to switch to selecting a day
Tap to switch to selecting a year
You can adjust the speaker volume when you turn off the mute mode.
Please add users via the door lock
The current mobile phone connection to WIFI signal is weak, which may cause unsuccessful network distribution. Are you sure to continue connecting?
Current network is slow, please switch network and try again
The network is not available, please check your network settings.
Fetching a new ad for the first time in %dms
"Exclusive cloud storage user's bookmarking function, allowing for the collection of exciting content"
Buy cloud storage and get facial recognition benefits for free, enjoying dual privileges
Cloud space has no capacity limit, and video recordings/images are automatically uploaded to the cloud
Automatically create an account after a new user logs in
"Set the notification time and method, personalized to match your needs"
"Whether smart lock or cat eye, all devices support"
"Support to add multiple mobile phone numbers, a family can receive notifications"
"Fingerprint, password, key, etc. multiple attempts to unlock error notification"
"Learn how voice calls will notify you"
Key messages, call to inform, never miss
The new password cannot be the same as the original password.
There is currently no scheduled time~
E207: Abandoning AdRequest because there is no network connectivity.
The mobile number is not registered
No call records available at the moment
E104: No identification set(either unit id or application code should be presented). onAdRequestFailed will not be called
Click the microphone button to record 30 seconds of voice and synchronize it to the smart display screen. When someone opens the door, the latest unread message will be played
Request received no response from the server.
Confirm and save input before adding
Not operable in the state of not selecting all
An attempt to request an ad has been made with insufficient size information. Please provide a size, max size, or use fill_parent as the dimensions for your BannerAdView.
No split screen has been added yet~
Rejected %s becasue user did not interact with the webview

string.name: nomal_saving_e6_hint
string.Data: According to the usage, it is recommended to switch to<font color=#4D7CFE>normal mode</font>，to save more power

resources.string: You are not using WiFi. Continue with the video call?
Please select at least one message.
Please enter letters, numbers or underscore
This is not the first OpenSDK launch in this app
An invalid number was passed to an MRAID function.
Open current page in native browser
Unable to operate for the time being, please try again later!
Admin password does not support remote unlocking
Pls click no disturbing while mobile in mute
We have detected that your notification permission is not open. We need you to open the notification permission
Activate cloud storage and collect alarms:
Long term storage in the cloud
Device remains after unbinding and deleting
AppStore URL detected, opening the page in the app store
Opening landing page in in-app browser
Opening landing page in native browser
Opening current page in native browser

string.name: other_low_battery_hint_one
string.Data: Low battery, please charge <font color=#4D7CFE>asap</font>

string.name: other_low_battery_hint_two
string.Data: "When charging, please <font color=#4D7CFE>don't remove</font> the screen from the bracket"

resources.string: Automatic renewal at a rate of %s yuan/month upon expiration, can be cancelled at any time, and the discount is only valid once
Free cloud storage for only %s days
Someone can ring the doorbell to view real-time videos

string.name: paid_cancel_hint
string.Data: Before the next deduction, in<font color=#3B86DD>Alipay → My → Settings → Payment Settings → Secret free payment/automatic deduction</font>Find the corresponding service and select<font color=#3B86DD>“Close service”</font>After expiration, there will be no further renewals。

resources.string: Comparison of Benefits between Cloud Storage and Card Storage
Device disconnection/damage can still be viewed
"Don't worry if the equipment is damaged or pried, check the historical records at any time"
Some models of equipment do not support video recording, please do not shoot if you mind
Message addition: Video recording, real-time storage, automatic upload
Someone rings the doorbell to automatically record a video and upload it to the cloud for real-time storage
1.The redemption point is an integer multiple of 100
3.Up to 20% of the order amount can be offset
No services have been activated yet
Please do not make duplicate purchases for the same order！
%s points can be used to offset %s yuan
Insufficient points, unable to deduct temporarily
Free collection of% s day cyclic storage% s video service
Free% s day circular storage and% s cloud storage service
You have already activated permanent visibility, no need to purchase again！

"1.Please carefully confirm the package you have purchased before making a purchase. Any losses incurred due to incorrect purchases will be the responsibility of the user
2.If the purchased service does not have the same effective time as the actual service or if you have any questions about the functionality, please contact customer service promptly for feedback (My Help Guide)
3.Refund Rules"

string.name: paid_rule_month_hint
string.Data:
•Full refund within 24 hours from the date of purchase。
•＞24 hours, ≤ one week, charged according to one week (one week fee=monthly (no discount) fee/4）
•If it exceeds one month, no refund will be given

string.name: paid_rule_year_hint
string.Data:
•Full refund within 24 hours from the date of purchase.
•＞24 hour，≤One week, charged according to one week (one week fee=monthly (no discount) fee)/4）
•＞One week, ≤ one month, charged based on the first month (no discounts)
•If it exceeds one month, no refund will be given

resources.string: When not activated, when someone rings the doorbell, only a static picture is captured. After activating this service, when someone rings the doorbell, they can remotely view real-time videos at their doorstep
Support custom reminder time periods and scenarios, personalized matching
Important notice, call immediately to remind

Supports scenarios such as ringing the doorbell, low battery on the door lock, detecting the door lock being pried open, using a hostage password or fingerprint, multiple unlocking errors, etc., and will immediately call to remind you
Support adding multiple phone numbers, the whole family can receive communication
"Key news, call to notify, don't miss it again"
Support multiple devices such as smart locks, smart cat eyes, and smart cameras
Password changed successfully. Please sign in again
If you forget the password, please restore the factory settings to re-add!
"The order has been generated, you can view the order in my - orders."
"The order will be cancelled if it is not paid. Please complete the payment as soon as possible."
QQ is not installed or installed version is not supported

Due to the need for our application to pop up a doorbell, we need you to turn on the Allow display on top of other applications switch, otherwise there will be no incoming call interface when the application enters the background

string.name: permission_content_other_phone
string.Data: Due to the need for our application to pop up a doorbell, we require your manual permission<font color=#4D7CFE>“Background pop-up interface”</font>Otherwise, there will be no incoming call interface when the application enters the backend

string.name: permission_content_other_phone_oppo
string.Data: Due to the need for our application to pop up a doorbell, we require your manual permission<font color=#4D7CFE>“Floating frame”</font>Otherwise, there will be no incoming call interface when the application enters the backend

resources.string: Used for quick device binding and addition
Used to scan QR codes for device binding and personal profile modification
In order for you to use Dingdong normally, you need the following access permissions
Used to obtain WLAN and Bluetooth lists during device fast connection
Used for making customer service calls and receiving voice call notifications
"Used to store alarm images generated by cat's eye lock devices"
E102: The SDK needs permission INTERNET in the host app.
"E100: Location permissions ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION and/or ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION aren't set in the host app. This may affect demand."
E101: The SDK needs permission ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE in the host app.
This email has already been bound.
The phone number has been bound.
"You have bound %s . To change, please enter the new email address."
"You have bound %s If. To change, please enter a new one."
密码长度6-16位，数字、字母、字符任意组合
该账号已注册，无法被绑定！
Please enter the correct phone number!

string.name: pir_info_details_hint
string.Data: The storage time is %s days. Please check it in time; View 1 time and download it locally without deleting it

resources.string: "When it's on, photos or videos will be taken when people detected, but the standby time will be greatly shortened."
Standby time will be greatly shortened. Are you sure to turn it on?
Photos or videos will be taken when people detected, but the standby time will be greatly shortened.
MRAID playVideo() called, but no URI given
Request failed, please exit play and try again!
Please make sure to save the input content before editing
The device can be turned on and off at a specified time point
Are you sure to replace the existing schedule?
The status of the indicator light can convey the on/off status of the light
When the lights are turned off, they light up to indicate the position of the switch at night
Power on again or press 4 times continuously to locally release
The power will automatically turn off after 40 minutes of continuous operation with a power of less than 3W

string.name: power_saving_e6_hint
string.Data: According to the usage, it is recommended to switch to<font color=#4D7CFE> power saving mode</font>，to save more power

string.name: power_saving_h5_hint
string.Data: According to the past use, it is recommended to turn off intelligent human detection, which can greatly prolong the battery life <font color=#4D7CFE>（after turning off, someone can still answer the call if someone rings the doorbell）</font>

resources.string: 5 Feed within minutes, confirm to feed again？

"When the shooting range of your smart door lock camera may involve other people's private areas (such as neighbors' doorways, public corridors, etc.), you can manually select the occluded area through the privacy masking function to ensure that sensitive parts in the picture are blurred and avoid infringing on others' privacy."
Please set up a masking area first
It is recommended to replace the battery in a timely manner after using it for more than 3 years
"1.Please select System Settings - Networking Settings on the Cat's Eye indoor host and click Next 2.Confirm that the QR code is displayed on the screen, click Next"
Put the device into distribution network mode
The sound level of the doorbell when an alarm is generated
Ares doorbell is not online, please delete ares box directly
Please fill in SMS verification code.
Verification code invalid, please send again.
Unable to get captcha, please check your network connection
Please enter the device name that you want to share
The length should be between 6-20 characters, including alphanumeric characters (letters A-Z, numbers 0-9), or underscores.
I have read and agreed to the relevant services and agreements
Please read the relevant services and agreements and agree
The device is offline. Please wake up the device and start the call again!
After logout, the account associated data will be deleted. Are you sure to logout?
After deleting account,all account data will be cleared.
Including but not limited to the following:
Cloud storage, facial recognition, voice calls, and other cloud services and data
Small master, deletion failed, please try again later
Ad request will be delayed by %dms to account for idletime
Little master, there is no new data
Error requesting data, refresh and try again
Parameter %s cannot be overridden by custom keywords
The request has timed out. Please check the device and network then try again.
MRAID resize() called with w:%d, h:%d, offset_x:%d, offset_y:%d, cust_close_position:%s, allow_offscreen:%b
The server returned a blank 200 OK HTTP response.
E301: The server replied with an error: %s:%s
E300: There was an error parsing the JSON response: %s
"The server responded, but didn't return any ads."
Restarting failed, please check the network.
The device is restarting. It may take sometime. After restart, it will be online.
Are you sure you want to restart the device?
Restarting…please be patient as it will take a few moments.
result cb returned a bad response
The call is not answered for long time. The device has entered the power-saving mode and cannot be answered!
用户不存在，或密码错误
账号已存在，请直接切换登录
请先注册或者添加机器人账号
本报告的体检数据以及结论不作为诊断和治疗依据，具体治疗谨遵医嘱

string.name: robot_type_status
string.Data: %s：<font color=#E44D42>%s</font> 状态：<font color=#F27411>%s</font>

resources.string: Auto adjust the the sensitivity upon the ambient temperature
Equipment damage or disconnection, but historical recordings can still be viewed anytime and anywhere
Security password verification is required for remote unlocking after opening
Connect a separate router to the device
Set the alarm mode to take pictures
The QR code is invalid. Please refresh the QR code on the device side!
Please scan the QR code on the equipment or manual

string.name: scan_hint1
string.Data: 1. Please select<font color=\"# 497BFE\">\"System Settings - Scan QR Code\"</font>on the door lock room screen

resources.string: 2. After hearing the voice prompt, face the app QR code directly towards the door lock camera
Please put the QR code on the device screen into the box
Scan the QR code on the Hub bottomside
Please put the QR code in the frame to scan
Place the code within the frame
Stopped ad requests since screen is off
Starting ad requests since screen is on
Enable storage permission to use this function
Note: Micro SD card is not available.
Scanning WiFi failed, please trigger the device to enter network distribution mode again
Please click to view detailed content!
Mark the selected notifications as read
The verification code has been sent to
WiFi information has been sent successfully.
Fill in the deduction coupon code
Pls insert SD card in device
3. after successful binding, the device will appear in the tmall Genie app; When you ring the doorbell, tmall elf will say master, the doorbell rings

string.name: set_bind_tmall_step_five
string.Data: 3.tmall Genie voice<font color=#4D7CFE>device connection in progress, next later”</font>，click next

string.name: set_bind_tmall_step_four
string.Data: "2.the voice of tmall genie has found your mobile smart cat's eye, do you want to connect, and say to tmall genie <font color=#4D7CFE>connect”</font>"

string.name: set_bind_tmall_step_one
string.Data: 1. make tmall elf within<font color=#4D7CFE>1.5m</font>from the doorbell

string.name: set_bind_tmall_step_seven
string.Data: 2. tmall Genie voice<font color=#4D7CFE>binding failed, please try again”</font>，click OK and try again；

string.name: set_bind_tmall_step_six
string.Data: 1. tmall Genie voice<font color=#4D7CFE>smart device connected successfully”</font>，click OK

string.name: set_bind_tmall_step_three
string.Data: 1.when the doorbell voice prompts <font color=#4D7CFE>binding tmall elf”</font>, say<font color=#4D7CFE>tmall elf, find teammates”</font>

resources.string: 2. press the doorbell key to wake up the doorbell
Choose whether to turn on night vision according to the light environment at the door
Accept all event notifications and message reminders
Only receive notifications of alarm/doorbell events
If someone rings the doorbell, low battery alarm, smart lock is pried, etc
No longer receive any message reminders
MRAID setOrientationProperties called with allow_orientation_change=%b, orientation=%d
Please set a security password for app remote unlocking
Please enter the security password for app remote unlocking
"Please light up the cat's eye screen or press the doorbell button to wake up the cat's eye"
Pls turn on mobile GPS to get Internet list
Please enter a new security password
Forgot your security password? Use login password authentication
Please enter the original security password
Already connect the \"%s\" shared device successfully.
You can withdraw user rights at any time
Recipient can view the alarm, doorbell alerts
The sharer has no permission to set the device
Already connect the \"%s\" shared device successfully.
Invalid QR code, please scan again
QR code is invalid, please check.
Connected, please do not scan again
Save QR code to phone album.
Setup failed. The user has initiated to unbound.
Ask recipient to install our APP;
Sending QR code to share device
Let the other party open the APP and enter the interface of adding device. Click the scan button in the upper right corner to scan the code to bind
Sharing users do not support setting operations
Download Dingdong App and register an account
"Click on the \"+\" in the upper right corner nUse Scan to scan the code"
"You haven't shared it with your family yet"
Three simple steps for easy sharing
[eques] the user%s created a periodic temporary unlocking password for you:%s, effective from%s to%s, and the effective period is%s of every%s. Please take care not to tell others.
[eques] the user%s created a one-time temporary unlocking password for you:%s, effective from%s to%s, effective for%s. Once used, it will be invalid. Please take care not to tell others.
Please contact the main user to add a user
Users who accept shared devices cannot share their devices again
Open the App, enter the interface of add device, click scan code button in the upper right corner to scan code to bind

In order to trace the source of your closed-loop sharing function and help you to refine which APP you have shared with one-click or logged in via third-party APP, MobTech should have your active (meaning: opt-in) consent to collect your software list information independently. If you refuse, you will not be able to use the related products and / or services.
showLoadingIndicator has been set in xml
Why does the door lock enter sleep mode？

"1.Cannot remotely view videos in sleep mode, consumes less battery, and can extend the battery life of the door lock；
2.Every time someone rings the doorbell or lights up the indoor screen, the door lock enters the wake-up state；
3.You can also switch to monitoring mode to check the dynamics of the entrance at any time. Please note that this mode will increase power consumption"
Palm print attempts to unlock frozen
Unlock the door with the button inside
Lock the door with the button inside
The lock cylinder cover has been opened
The lock cylinder cover is closed
The disinfection lamp has been turned off
The door opening is not aligned
The lock was already unlocked seconds ago. Are you sure you want to unlock it again?
The shortest silent time is one hour
After activation, the split screen device will enter silent mode
目前您的支付宝版本过低或未安装，需要安装支付宝才能使用
手机认证服务由中国移动提供
正在校验您的身份，请稍后...
登录失败，请尝试短信验证码登录
并授权统一认证融合版获取本机号码
自动发送短信登陆，请允许通过
由于您已开启 不保留活动 ,导致授权功能无法正常使用.我们建议您点击左下方 设置 按钮,在 开发者选项 中关闭 不保留活动 功能.
目前您的FacebookMessenger版本过低或未安装，需要安装才能使用
Google+ 版本过低或者没有安装，需要升级或安装Google+才能使用！
Instagram版本过低或者没有安装，需要升级或安装Instagram才能使用！
%s
目前您的KakaoStory版本过低或未安装，需要安装KakaoStory才能使用
目前您的KakaoTalk版本过低或未安装，需要安装KakaoTalk才能使用
目前您的来往版本过低或未安装，需要安装来往才能使用
目前您的Line版本过低或未安装，需要安装Line才能使用
Pinterest版本过低或者没有安装，需要升级或安装Pinterest才能使用！
QQ 版本过低或者没有安装，需要升级或安装QQ才能使用！
网络出错啦，请点击按钮重新加载
"验证码短信可能略有延迟，确定返回 并重新开始？"
"我们将发送验证码短信到这个手机号： "
验证码不正确，请重新填写
您输入的是一个无效手机号码
请求参数列表中缺少必要数据
"该号码超过接收验证码上 限次数，请明日再试"
"该设备超过请求发送验证 码上限次数，请明日再试"
网络不给力，请稍后重试
"您的设备为安全设备，该号码已通过智能 云验证，无需短信验证 （本验证过程不存在任何安全隐患）"
恭喜！该号码已通过云检测
系统有点小问题，请稍后重试
"我们将以电话的方式告知您验证码， 请注意接听"

string.name: ssdk_sms_input_voice_code
string.Data: 短信验证码收不到？请尝试<font color=#2ba245>语音验证码</font>

resources.string: 短信已发送，请填写验证码
目前您的Telegram版本过低或未安装，需要安装才能使用
目前您的微信版本过低或未安装微信，需要安装微信才能使用
目前您的WhatsApp版本过低或未安装，需要安装WhatsApp才能使用
目前您的易信版本过低或未安装，需要安装易信才能使用
SSL authentication fails, continue access or not?
There was an error while storing picture.
This Ad would like permission to save a picture.
End time must be 1 hour greater than start time
After opening, you can remotely view the screen in front of the door at any time
*Please turn on the cat eye screen or press the doorbell key to turn on this function when the cat eye is connected to the Internet
*During the set time period, the device is always connected to the network, which will shorten the standby time
*When the battery power is low, the cat eye will exit the monitoring mode
*Please turn on the cat eye screen or press the doorbell key to turn on this function when the cat eye is connected to the Internet
*This is a lab function, free experience for a limited time
After opening, it can support remote unlocking at any time
After the monitoring mode is turned on, the standby time will be greatly reduced. Are you sure to turn it on?
The set time period will take effect automatically when the device is next online
Successfully saved, takes effect after the next device wakes up
Screen switched on automatically when motion detection is triggered

string.name: t1_first_ident_remind_sw_hint
string.Data: Face is recognized for the first time. Reminder:<font color=#754C24>owner, cat eye reminder, someone stays outside the door</font>

resources.string: "Face is recognized for the first time, reminding: owner, cat's eye, someone stays outside"

string.name: t1_no_ident_remind_sw_hint
string.Data: "Someone is detected, but the face is not recognized<font size=8>（it may not be recognized due to shooting angle, light, etc.）</font>，reminder <font color=#754C24>owner, cat's eye reminder, someone stays outside the door</font>"

resources.string: Someone is detected, but the face is not recognized. Reminder: owner, cat eye reminder, someone stays outside the door
After restoring the factory settings, the relevant parameters of the device will be restored to the default values

string.name: t1_ring_remind_sw_hint
string.Data: When someone rings the doorbell, remind：<font color=#754C24>master, the doorbell rings</font>

resources.string: Someone rang the doorbell to remind: Master, the doorbell is ringing
The current device version is low, please upgrade the device version!
Some router is incompatible, if device off line frequantely, normal mode is recommended
If the memory card has been inserted, please switch the machine on and off again
After enabling intercom sound tuning, the system will cancel the default intercom sound parameter settings!
The higher the debugging value, the lower the sound
Non cloud storage members can only set one security password
*The temporary password must start with the number 1 and cannot be edited or modified
Please enter a temporary password nickname
End time must be greater than start time
End time must be greater than current time
The number of password settings exceeds the upper limit
No temporary password within the validity period~
——The temporary password has taken effect. Share it with others——
This device does not support the feature.
3. The IP address of the router is static. Please set it to DHCP IP.
Collection failed, the content has expired
The number of favorite items has been used up, unable to collect
An interstitial ad was told to display, but is over the 60s mAge limit.
The new password is too long.
The new password is too short.
Click on the + button on the homepage to add a device, and select Smart Lock - Visual Smart Lock
Put the lock into distribution network mode and select the appropriate networking method based on the lock model
Adding a device that only supports 2.4GHz WiFi, please check the WiFi signal type of the router
The final step of adding successfully is to set a security password for remote unlocking of the app
Click on the sharing icon in the upper right corner of the device homepage
Choose to share with family or friends, the other party needs to install the app in advance and complete registration
"You can share QR codes through WeChat, QQ, or save them to your phone's photo album before sharing"
The shared user opens the app, clicks on the add icon to enter the add device interface, and clicks on the scan button in the upper right corner to scan the shared QR code
How to set up WeChat reminders？
Click on the settings icon in the upper right corner of the device homepage to enter the settings interface, and click on WeChat Reminder
Click the Save to Phone Album button to save the QR code locally
Open WeChat and scan the QR code in the photo album to jump to the official WeChat account of Yikang Intelligent Cat Eye. Click the Bind Device button
Click Alarm Message on the lower left corner of the official account to accept and view device messages on WeChat
transition direction has been set in xml
transition duration has been set in xml
transition type has been set in xml
"1/3. Please press the Set button before binding a device. Then click the next step."
请打开应用安装权限，以便顺利安装！
确认要删除%1$s的下载任务吗？
SdCard空间不足, 下载失败。
文件过大，需要通过 WLAN 下载。
为了您能在方便地在通知栏控制下载任务，请到设置中开启通知，如果不需要可直接下载
您当前处于移动网络，是否需要在Wi-Fi环境下恢复下载？

"立即开始下载此内容 (%1$s ) 可能会缩短电池的使用时间并/或导致过量使用移动数据连接流量（这可能导致移动运营商向您收费，具体取决于您的流量套餐）。
触摸“%2$s”可在下次连接到 WLAN 网络时开始下载此内容。"
稍后再加入下载队列吗？

"您必须使用 WLAN 完成此内容 (%1$s ) 的下载。
触摸“%2$s ”可在下次连接到 WLAN 网络时开始下载此内容。"
文件太大，不适于通过运营商网络下载
正在使用非Wifi网络，确认要进行下载吗？
请具体说明问题，我们将尽快处理
您已成功提交反馈，请勿重复提交哦！
"感谢您的反馈！ 我们将为您带来更优质的广告体验"
官方app下载完成，是否立即安装？
暂无更多内容，奖励已发放
需要下滑浏览更多才能领取奖励哦
暂无更多内容，继续浏览%1$s秒可得奖励
error_adn:%1$s no ads，please check ad network
slot setting error, pangle default ads will be displayed
您已禁止授权操作，请授权
您已禁止授权操作，请授权
上滑浏览更多视频领奖励
Jump to details page or third party application
Shake or click to learn more
前往详情页或第三方应用
Go to details page or third-party application
Go to details page or third-party application
Twist the phone or tap the icon
Constant recording till detection ends will lead to more power consumption

The maximum video recording time for the device is the current set time, and it will continue to record until the detection is completed. The maximum recording time is 120 seconds, and the device needs to be inserted into an SD card for use
Device will be more smooth by inputting SD card
The network is not working, hang up and try again
The network can not be detected, hang up and try again
The network is busy, please wait
Both input and output Uri must be specified
Therefore, override color resource (ucrop_color_toolbar_widget) in your app to make it work on pre-L devices
The device has not been bound with the door lock.
"E204: Ad couldn't be fetched due to unknown exception, see above trace."
"Ad couldn't be fetched due to unknown internet exception, maybe internet connect error."
"The door is open. Please remember to close it."
The password should be between 6-12 characters
Cannot play video due to unsupported encoding
Do not operate the lock plate during the upgrade process
Change the network under WiFi only,
The current device version is too low! Please ring the doorbell and click upgrade now to upgrade
%s is required to update this app. Install now?
Update available. Please download and install the latest version.
Unable to retrieve information. Please try again later.
"You're currently connected to a mobile network. Downloading now will use %1$s of data."
No Internet connection. Please check your network settings.
Your version is up to date.
Have questions about orders or features？
Click to contact human customer service

"1：Please carefully confirm the package you have purchased before making a purchase. Any losses incurred due to incorrect purchases will be the responsibility of the user. 2：If the purchased service does not have the same effective time as the actual service or if you have any questions about the functionality, please contact customer service promptly for feedback (My Help Guide)。 3：This service is a virtual service product and is not within the scope of 7-day no reason return and exchange. It is difficult to support returns and exchanges after purchase."
Open cloud storage and view complete videos
The discount amount has changed, please resubmit the order
The duration of recording videos after eating
Verification code is invalid, please send again
Other devices are currently live streaming, please try again later
System recording is limited to 30 seconds
Enable microphone permission to use this function
When someone rings the doorbell, they can remotely view the video

"Your device is for image transfer. After ringing the doorbell or alarm, you can receive a captured image (free of charge).
You can upgrade to the visual version, which can provide real-time video after pressing the doorbell. Would you like to upgrade?"

string.name: visitor_face_name_hint
string.Data: <font color=#3b86dd>%s</font>按门铃

string.name: vl0_hot_set_hint1
string.Data: 1. operate according to the product manual and select the <font color=#4D7CFE> hotspot networking </font> mode. Different lock operation methods are slightly different

resources.string: 2. When you see the indoor display screen as shown in the following figure, click next

string.name: vl0_hot_set_hint_bulfi
string.Data: 1. operate according to the product manual and select the <font color=#4D7CFE> Bluetooth networking </font>mode. Different lock operation methods are slightly different

resources.string: The security password already exists, please do not set it again
Failed to set, please go to device settings to set
During power saving operation, please wake up the device

string.name: vl0_wifi_set_hint1
string.Data: 1.perate according to the product manual and select <font color=#4D7CFE>WiFi networking </font> mode. Different lock operation methods are slightly different

resources.string: 2. When you see the indoor display screen as shown in the following figure, click next
Call to remind if you use a coercive fingerprint or password to unlock the lock
Purpose 1: for answering voice call notification
Purpose 2: as a login app account

string.name: voice_call_service_opened_details
string.Data: Service duration%s / calls%s, multiple devices

string.name: voice_call_service_package_details_hint
string.Data:
>Selected: service duration%s / call times%s, multiple devices
¥%s %s

resources.string: Unlock multiple trial and error alarms
请注意接听陌生固定电话的来电

"Be careful： 1.Only mobile phone numbers in Chinese Mainland are supported 2.Phone notifications that incoming phone numbers may be mistakenly marked as harassing or advertising calls by some mobile phones. Please do not block them, otherwise you will not be able to receive reminder calls normally"

The call notification number may be incorrectly marked as harassment or advertising call by some mobile phones. Please do not black it, otherwise you will not be able to receive the notification call normally
When someone rings the doorbell, they call to remind them
Call to remind if the reminder is not triggered for a long time

string.name: voice_service_integral_deduction
string.Data: There are <font color=#FB8D31>%s points in total,</font>available<font color=#FB8D31> to deduct </font>， to deduct <font color=#FB8D31>%s yuan</font>

string.name: voice_service_integral_deduction_protocol
string.Data: Consent upon purchase<font color=#4AACE0>《 voice telephone service agreement 》</font>

resources.string: 多长时间未触发报警，电话通知提醒
Call to remind if the power of the device is too low
Mobile number has not been added!
Unable to make a call notification!
Call to remind you of the wrong unlocking attempts
Error notification of fingerprint, password, key and other multiple attempts to unlock
Enter the hold fingerprint or password unlock notification
Notification of smart lock or doorbell being pried
Reminder notification not triggered for a long time
*Within the set time period, the device will receive message push and telephone reminder when it triggers an alarm. After this period, the alarm will only push messages
Please select at least one cycle
Number of calls: Used %s times/total %s times
Mobile number has not been added
Using this reminder, the intelligent guard alarm function must be turned on
Using this reminder, the human intelligence detection function must be turned on
Please turn on the intelligent nursing alarm function first
Please enable the intelligent human detection function first
Someone rings the doorbell to make a phone call, and answering will enable real-time voice intercom
Someone rings the doorbell, real-time voice intercom
Comparison of Telephone Reminders and Voice Telephone Benefits

"1.Phone reminders are counted per call, with each call counted as one; Voice calls are counted in minutes, and less than 1 minute is counted as 1 minute; 2.If both telephone reminders and voice call services are activated, priority will be given to voice calls when someone rings the doorbell. When the voice call service expires or runs out, a telephone reminder will be provided, and other alarm scenarios will not be affected。"
When someone rings the doorbell, you can dial the contact number you set with just one click to answer and have real-time two-way voice communication

string.name: voip_phone_hint2
string.Data: "Input on the device's incoming call interface<font color=#4D7CFE>1#</font>Can achieve remote unlocking"

resources.string: Support custom call time periods, only call within the set time period, personalized matching to your needs
*Only mobile phone numbers in Chinese Mainland are supported
"Something's wrong with the network connection. Please check."
The lock has been opened by a key.
Failed, maybe the App is offline, please check and try again
"2. We don't support the encryption mode of the router."
E206: Error %d received, %s, while fetching url %s
4. WIFI password cannot contain a space.
"Are you sure your password's last digit is a space?"
Try to load wifi-only video on cellular network %s

When someone rings the doorbell or lights up the screen, they are connected to the Internet, and can view the door outside through the app. They can unlock the door remotely, which is very power-saving
It has been connected to the Internet all the time, and can view the door outside and unlock the door remotely at any time with the app
"Follow the Yikang smart cat eye official wechat official account"
WeChat login users currently do not support password modification
To avoid missing important notifications, it is recommended to bind WeChat reminders

string.name: xm_bind_dev_hint_one
string.Data: 1.长按设备RST键，听到语音提示<font color=#FF8230>“恢复出厂设置中，请勿断电”</font>，松开RST键

string.name: xm_bind_dev_hint_scan_three
string.Data: 3.听到<font color=#FF8230>“扫描二维码成功”</font>提示音后，点击“下一步”

string.name: xm_bind_dev_hint_scan_two
string.Data: 2.等待语音提示；<font color=#FF8230>“系统启动中，开始快速配置”</font>，将二维码朝向设备摄像头

string.name: xm_bind_dev_hint_two
string.Data: 2.当看到红灯闪烁；<font color=#FF8230>“系统启动中，开始快速配置”</font>，点击“下一步”

resources.string: 网络信息获取有误，请重新进入绑定
“打开移动追踪时，摄像头转动的速度”
“远程对讲时，设备喇叭发出的声音”
"•24小时录像保存在SD卡 •检测到画面变动或有人时录像报警"
仅检测到画板变动或有人时录像报警上传手机App
开启后，无法进入远程查看摄像头，无法录像
开启后，摄像头跟随目标转动，同时人形侦测功能会关闭
按门铃摄像头语音提示：“主人，有人按门铃”
摄像头已关闭，暂停录像和报警
恢复出厂设置需要重新绑定，确认恢复出厂设置吗？
若“快速配网”无法绑定，请使用“扫码配网”绑定
请确认分享二维码是否正常有效
当画面变动，主动录像报警，并上传APP
打开后，侦测到有人时进行报警录像，同时移动追踪功能将关闭
是否确认升级固件版本？
如已插卡，请拔插电源或重启设备
Ad height set to %d in xml
Ad width set to %s in xml
Ad width set to %d in xml
setDoesLoadingInBackground has been set to %b in xml
Auto-refresh is set to %b in xml
OpensNativeBrowser is set to %b in xml
Auto refresh interval set to %dms in xml
ShouldReloadOnResume is set to %b in xml
Test mode set to %b in xml
Sound is played through ear speaker
Use ear speaker to play sound
Switched from ear speaker to speaker
Failed to convert the audio to text
Conversation is over. The form is expired
Please select the order you are consulting about
Please select video files in 3GP and MP4 format
Cannot connect to video device. Please try again later
Cannot obtain work order list in the current status
Pre-inquiry is required for live agent. Sure to quit the conversation?
Continue consulting online customer service? You can go visit other pages. We’ll let you know when we’ve got you in the queue
You are not connected to WIFI. Downloading files will consume mobile data. Sure to continue downloading?
Downloading files will consume mobile data
Failed to download. Please try again
Boundary size of x or y should be at least %1$dpx, and the file size shouldn’t exceed %2$sM
You can select %1$d files at most
%1$d photos are bigger than %2$d M and cannot be uploaded. Full Image box will be unchecked
The image is bigger than %1$d M and cannot be uploaded. Full Image box will be unchecked
Cannot select images and videos at the same time
Sure to discard the rating? It can not be recovered once discarded
Failed to rate. Please try again later
Thank you for consulting us. Please rate our service
We have received your rating. Thank you!
You have rated our service as
Rating has timed out. Cannot rate
Sorry, the file you choose exceeds the limit
Please select the book you are importing
Videos longer than 30 seconds and bigger than 50M are filtered out for you
No APPs for opening the file currently
QiYu cannot open files of this type currently. You can use other APPs to open and preview them
Preview is not supported for this format file
You currently need to supplement the following information
Failed to obtain work order data. Please try again later
Failed to obtain work order information. Please try again later...
Failed to obtain work order list. Please try again later...
To provide better service for you, please select what you are consulting about
Please select video files in 3GP and MP4 format
Video file too big. The limit is 20MB
Dear customer, it’s non-working time now. Please leave a message if you have any questions.
Sure to discard the current changes?
Customer service not online. Cannot send message currently
Your message has been received. We’ll reply to you as soon as we can
Please log in Yunxin SDK first
Cannot play the video currently. Please try again
Message expired. Please enter your message to reconnect to the customer service
Thanks for your rating. Please fill in specific reasons to help us improve
The message contains prohibited information. Failed to send
Failed to quit queuing. Please try again later
Failed to quit the conversation. Please try again later
Network abnormal. Please try again later
Network connection failed. Please try again later
Network currently unavailable. Please check your network
Message downloading not finished or message error!
No access. Cannot send voice message!
Customer service is not online currently. Please leave your message
Customer service is not online. Cannot leave a message
Confirm (You may choose more than one options)
The phone number is less than %1$d digits
Only jpg/png/bmp/gif images are supported for transfer
You can select %d images at most!
SD card was removed and the storage space is insufficient. Cannot save the media message
You can tap the button below to directly communicate with %1$s customer service
Quick entry of the vendor customer service has expired
Please tap the buttons below to fill in information
Please let us know the specific reasons
Failed to load. Please try again later
Failed to refresh. Please try again later
Please select what you are consulting about
You are in a queue now. Sure to leave the queue and initiate a new consultation
Failed to load. Please load again
Failed to send. Please send later...
Non-bot status now. Cannot submit work order
Invalid operation by the bot in conversation history. To consult the corresponding bot, please enter again.
Failed to send. Conversation is over
Failed to send. A bot can’t read a card
Please wait for the connection to succeed before sending a message
Queuing. You are in the %1$dth position. You’ll be automatically connected when it’s your turn
The queue is long now. Please wait...
There is an ongoing conversation. Sure to end it and initiate a new consultation
Failed to connect. You can try
The account has logged in on another device
%2$s from %1$s is here to help you
Failed to start the camera to record a video
Failed to start file selector. Please check if the file storage on your phone is normal
Cannot rate in the current status
Failed to pause. May have paused already
Failed to transfer. Please try again later
Client version does not support this content
Video is saved to your phone. Please view it in %1$s
Incorrect work order id. Please obtain it again
